utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget (6 total). Checking the final property solution: all six required items are present. Each of them is fully specified with appropriate details. 'property' includes full description and price; 'financing' includes type, down payment, interest rate, and monthly payment; 'legal_services' includes service name and cost; 'moving_services' includes service name and cost; 'setup_services' includes package name, cost, services list, and currency; and 'total_budget' provides a detailed breakdown with all relevant costs. There is also an extra item 'property_survey', but that does not affect the count since all required items are fully covered.
